title: Echo by Tracer
content_html:
Claude-class results. Open-weight economics.

Frontier intelligence.
Without frontier pricing.

The last model you need to pick. No modes. Echo adapts to each task and allocates the intelligence it needs. One model. One OpenAI-compatible endpoint. Chat, code, and agents.

Try a real request

The result, in plain English

Comparable quality.
About one-third the cost.

On the same evaluated tasks, Echo reached Claude Fable-level results and outperformed every individual open-weight model we tested. Explore every result

Quality Claude Fable-level Comparable results across the published task mix.
Cost Roughly one-third Total inference cost across that same task mix.
Open-weight baseline Stronger than any one Echo outperformed each individual open-weight model tested.

This is promising, scoped evidence, not a claim that Echo wins every task. The full questions, answers, grades, and methodology are public.

Cookies on Echo

Echo uses essential cookies. Optional, privacy-masked product analytics and session replay help us improve Echo. Prompts, responses, form inputs, credentials, attachments, and billing details are excluded. Learn more.

content_html_zh:
克劳德级的成绩。 开放重量经济学。

前沿情报。无前沿定价。

您需要选择的最后一个型号。 没有模式。 Echo 会适应每项任务并分配其所需的智能。 一种型号。 一个 OpenAI 兼容端点。 聊天、代码和代理。

尝试真实的请求

结果，用简单的英语

质量相当。成本约为三分之一。

在相同的评估任务中，Echo 达到了 Claude Fable 级别的结果，并且优于我们测试的每个单独的开放权重模型。 探索每一个结果

Quality Claude Fable-level Comparable results across the published task mix.
Cost Roughly one-third Total inference cost across that same task mix.
Open-weight baseline Stronger than any one Echo outperformed each individual open-weight model tested.

这是有希望的、有范围的证据，而不是声称 Echo 赢得了所有任务。 完整的问题、答案、成绩和方法都是公开的。

Echo 上的 Cookie

Echo 使用必要的 cookie。 可选的、隐私屏蔽的产品分析和会话重播帮助我们改进 Echo。 提示、响应、表单输入、凭据、附件和账单详细信息均被排除在外。 了解更多。
